name: aai-loaders
title: AAI Loaders
author: Earendel
description: Loaders designed by Wube's concept artist, Earendel. 2 gameplay styles: Cheap but requires lubricant to run, or expensive but no operating cost. Built-in compatibility with AAI Industries, Space Exploration, Krastorio 2, Pyanodons, and Industrial Revolution 2 and 3.
